title: Verify the display of the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7.
expected_result: The screen should display the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7 with verse numbers (85, 86, 87, 88, 89) highlighted in red.

title: Verify the highlighting of verses 86 and 87 in pink
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7. | Verify that verses 86 and 87 are highlighted in pink.
expected_result: Verses 86 and 87 should be highlighted in pink.

title: Verify the functionality of the audio button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7. | Click on the audio button. | Verify that the audio starts playing.

title: Verify the functionality of the menu icon in the header
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Verify that the menu options are displayed.
expected_result: The menu options should be displayed.

title: Verify the functionality of the search icon in the header
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Enter a search term and verify that the search results are displayed.
expected_result: The search results should be displayed.

title: Verify the functionality of the navigation back button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7. | Click on the navigation back button. | Verify that the user is navigated back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user should be navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Verify the functionality of the navigation forward button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7. | Click on the navigation forward button. | Verify that the user is navigated to the next screen.
expected_result: The user should be navigated to the next screen.

title: Verify the functionality of the navigation home button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying the biblical text from Book of Numbers, chapter 7. | Click on the navigation home button. | Verify that the user is navigated to the home screen.
expected_result: The user should be navigated to the home screen.
